title: batrachium sphaerospermum
intro: Batrachium sphaerospermum, also known as the spore-bearing hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Batrachospermaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Batrachium sphaerospermum include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Batrachium sphaerospermum are typically made by infusing the plant in water or using it as a decoction to create teas and infusions.
